name: nocodemf--customs-trade-compliance
description: Codified expertise for customs documentation, tariff classification, duty optimisation, restricted party screening, and regulatory compliance across multiple jurisdictions. Informed by trade compliance specialists with 15+ years experience. Includes HS classification logic, Incoterms application, FTA utilisation, and penalty mitigation. Use when handling customs clearance, tariff classification, trade compliance, import/export documentation, or duty optimisation.
